name: eleva-agent
description: Agent plugin for Eleva.js providing action registry, command bus, audit logging, permissions, schema validation, and state inspection for AI/agent workflows.

configuration.name: maxLogSize
configuration.description: Maximum audit log entries before FIFO rotation.

configuration.name: enableInspection
configuration.description: Enable inspect(), snapshot(), and diff() methods. When false, these are omitted from ctx.agent.

configuration.name: onError
configuration.description: Custom error handler called on execute() and dispatch() permission/handler errors. NOT called for register(), dispatch() invalid type, or onCommand() validation errors — those throw directly.

configuration.name: emitterEvents
configuration.description: Emitter event prefixes to capture in audit log (e.g., ["store:", "router:"]).

configuration.name: strictPermissions
configuration.description: When true, scope is mandatory for execute/dispatch and calls without a scope are denied.

configuration.name: validateSchemas
configuration.description: When true, execute() validates payload against action's schema.input before calling handler.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Register a callable action with optional schema.
sideEffects: Overwrites silently if action name already exists.
Does NOT call onError — throws directly.
Updates actionCount signal.
Emits 'agent:register' via eleva.emitter (failure-isolated).

methods.name: unregister
sideEffects: Warns via console.warn if action not found.
Updates actionCount signal.
Emits 'agent:unregister' via eleva.emitter (failure-isolated).

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Execute a registered action with optional scope-based permission check. Order: permission check -> schema validation (if enabled) -> handler invocation -> audit log entry with outcome.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Data to pass to the action handler.

returns.description: The result of the action handler.

sideEffects: Writes audit log entry with result/error/durationMs after handler completes.
Calls onError callback on permission, not-found, schema, and handler errors (failure-isolated).
Checks permissions before execution.
Validates payload against schema.input if validateSchemas is true.
Emits 'agent:execute' on success or 'agent:execute:error' on failure via eleva.emitter (failure-isolated).
Updates lastActivity signal.

methods.name: executeBatch
methods.description: Execute multiple actions in parallel. All actions start concurrently via Promise.all(). Rejects with first error.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope for permission check (applied to all actions).

returns.description: Array of results in same order as input.

sideEffects: Each action writes its own audit log entry.

methods.name: executeSequence
methods.description: Execute actions sequentially, piping results. First action uses its own payload; subsequent actions receive the previous action's result as payload. Stops on first error.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope for permission check (applied to all actions).

returns.description: The result of the last action in the sequence.

sideEffects: Each action writes its own audit log entry.

methods.name: hasAction
methods.description: Check if an action is registered.

methods.name: describeAction
methods.description: Get an action's descriptor including its schema.

returns.description: Descriptor with name and schema, or null if not found.

methods.name: listActions
methods.description: List all registered actions with their schemas.

methods.name: describe
methods.description: Return a complete capability manifest for a given scope. Includes all actions (with allowed flag), commands, resolved permissions, and configuration.

methods.name: dispatch
methods.description: Dispatch a structured command through the command bus with optional scope-based permission check.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command object with type, optional target and payload.

sideEffects: Writes audit log entry with durationMs after all handlers complete. Handler errors are recorded in log entry's error field but dispatch still resolves.
Handler errors are caught, tagged with AGENT_HANDLER_ERROR (if no code), and passed to onError (failure-isolated) — but dispatch does NOT reject.
Does NOT call onError for invalid command type — throws directly.
Checks permissions before dispatch.
Emits 'agent:dispatch' via eleva.emitter (failure-isolated).
Updates lastActivity signal.

methods.name: onCommand
methods.description: Register a handler for a command type. Returns an unsubscribe function.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The command type to listen for.

returns.description: Unsubscribe function. Call to remove the handler.

sideEffects: Does NOT call onError — throws directly.

methods.name: getLog
methods.description: Query the audit log with optional filters.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter by type, since, action, or status.

methods.name: clearLog
sideEffects: All audit log entries are permanently removed.

methods.name: inspect
methods.description: Get the component registry info. Only available when enableInspection is true.

returns.description: Component registry with name, hasSetup, hasTemplate, hasChildren, hasStyle per component.

sideEffects: Warns via console.warn if inspection is disabled.
methods.conditional: Only available when enableInspection is true. Omitted from ctx.agent when disabled.

methods.name: snapshot
methods.description: Capture a serializable snapshot of the application state. Only available when enableInspection is true.

returns.description: Serializable state snapshot with timestamp, components, and plugins.

sideEffects: Warns via console.warn if inspection is disabled.
methods.conditional: Only available when enableInspection is true. Omitted from ctx.agent when disabled.

methods.name: diff
methods.description: Compare two snapshots and return added/removed components.

returns.description: Object with added and removed component name arrays.

methods.conditional: Only available when enableInspection is true.

AgentActionSchema.description: Action contract describing expected input, output, and errors.

input.description: Expected input fields with type names (e.g., {"name": "string", "age": "number"}).

errors.description: Known error codes this action may produce.

AgentLogEntry.description: Audit log entry recording an action execution, command dispatch, or emitter event.

action.description: Action name, command type, or emitter event name.

source.description: Origin context. Action: scope || "global". Command: command.target || scope || "global". Event: "emitter".

result.description: Handler return value (action entries only). Absent on error or non-action entries.

error.description: Error message if handler threw (action/command entries). Absent on success or event entries.

durationMs.description: Execution time in milliseconds (action/command entries). Absent on event entries.

AgentLogFilter.description: Filter options for querying the audit log.

status.description: Filter by outcome: "ok" = entries without error, "error" = entries with error.

AgentCommand.description: Structured command dispatched through the command bus.

AgentPermissionRule.description: Permission rule for a scope defining allowed actions and commands.

AgentActionDescriptor.description: Descriptor returned by describeAction() and listActions().

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when snapshot was taken.

components.type: Array<{name: string, hasSetup: boolean, hasChildren: boolean}>

added.description: Component names in snapshotB but not snapshotA.

removed.description: Component names in snapshotA but not snapshotB.

AgentCapabilityManifest.description: Complete capability manifest returned by describe(scope?).

actions.type: Array<{name: string, schema: AgentActionSchema | null, allowed: boolean}>
actions.description: All actions with scope-based access flag.

permissions.type: {scope: string | null, actions: string[], commands: string[]} | null
permissions.description: Resolved permission rules for the scope, or null.

config.type: {strictPermissions: boolean, maxLogSize: number, inspectionEnabled: boolean, validateSchemas: boolean}

AgentErrorContext.description: Structured error context passed to the onError callback.

method.description: The method that generated the error. Only execute() and dispatch() call onError.

errors.message: [AgentPlugin] Agent has been destroyed. Create a new instance via app.use(AgentPlugin).
errors.condition: Any mutating method called on a destroyed agent instance (stale reference after uninstall). Read-only methods (hasAction, describeAction, listActions, getLog, describe, inspect, snapshot, diff) return safe defaults instead.

errors.message: [AgentPlugin] Action handler must be a function
errors.condition: Handler argument to register() is not a function.

errors.message: [AgentPlugin] Command handler must be a function
errors.condition: Handler argument to onCommand() is not a function.
Scope does not have permission for the requested action.
Scope does not have permission for the requested command.
No action registered with the given name.
Command is falsy or command.type is not a string.
Payload does not match action's schema.input (only when validateSchemas is true). Error includes violations array.
Action or command handler threw an error without a pre-existing error.code. Auto-assigned by the plugin.

execute.description: Handler error is re-thrown after logging and onError.

dispatch.description: Handler error is caught, passed to onError, and logged — but dispatch still resolves.

permissions.description: Capability-based permission model with two modes.

rules: No permissions configured -> everything allowed (zero-config path).
Scope provided -> checked against permission rules.
No scope provided -> denied (scope is mandatory).
Scope provided -> checked against permission rules.

events.name: agent:register
events.payload: { name: string, hasSchema: boolean, timestamp: number }
events.description: Emitted after action registration via register().

events.name: agent:unregister
events.description: Emitted after action removal via unregister().

events.name: agent:execute
events.payload: { name: string, payload: unknown, result: unknown, durationMs: number, timestamp: number }

events.name: agent:execute:error
events.payload: { name: string, payload: unknown, error: string, durationMs: number, timestamp: number }

events.name: agent:dispatch
events.payload: { type: string, target: string | undefined, payload: unknown, errors?: string[], durationMs: number, timestamp: number }

properties.name: actionCount
properties.description: Reactive signal tracking the number of registered actions. Updates on register/unregister.

properties.name: lastActivity
properties.description: Reactive signal of the most recent audit log entry. Updates on every action execution, command dispatch, and captured emitter event.
